payload.label: shelf
payload.long_description: Partial vertical crop of a white/chrome metal wire pantry shelf with three to four visible tiers holding assorted boxed and jarred food items and containers; shelf is edge-cropped at the image border and slightly blurred — estimated ~1.2 meters from the camera.
